---
layout: default
title: "Monsoon Session Showdown and NDA’s Rajya Sabha Push"
date: 2026-07-14T03:43:28.144106+00:00
summary: "Parliament’s monsoon session begins with high-stakes legislative agendas, internal party rifts, and the NDA nearing a majority in the Rajya Sabha"
run_time_ist: "9:13AM"
---

<article class="digest-post">
  <a class="back-link" href="{{ '/' | relative_url }}">Political Brief</a>
  <p class="post-meta">Gemini Summary: 9:13AM</p>


<h2 class="section-title">India National Politics</h2>

<ul class="digest-points">
  <li><strong>Parliamentary dynamics:</strong> The NDA is six seats away from a Rajya Sabha majority as the monsoon session begins, with the government signaling a willingness to discuss the Manipur crisis amid opposition efforts to challenge the BJP.<span class="source-chips"><a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiogFBVV95cUxPbVc1WXBOUkVwQXdoV3JOazZ4QXNiSk0xTDNqT3FSRWZ5R3RrMUhoVWZLX240bDBMSnQ3M1d3S2drNFVJdWdaRzdqcmlWQjQ5R1BKZE1MbG90NmNFRnMtSWg4eG9BNURKVzZmZkRlMjk4YjJRN01odzFOZ3VaMk1RZVN3VnNWYzlVdGlBaDJkN1FtcENOUmpxZi02bmdZLXBJY0E?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I1</a> <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMioAFBVV95cUxQeGNzcnp5TlFQVFpURU5uY3Q2VnpmYms5Yk1vRkV3VUxYX1BYOXppX0NrWlpzUmc0UFFwQy1KbHJQekpJTEtOWXFSdWVjVEwtbEhnOEl1V2p2TUdNdlR5b2tjR05vTVFrNENfblpNZXlzb2pPRkNXdFpsa2JfTVllaHlqMnFYUzI2b00zVHltLWRhYng1TnRtTzZFaW5Pd1BJ?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I2</a> <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMi-?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I7</a> <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiowFBVV95cUxNaXQ0NWE3cUkyVGUzUWhpS1F5Y2taVmFrU21ZYk1naWVVMjNDMklwMllaVUtXZmRfWTB3VWRnZVZiRnVIUnN1cHhEVjdaQndrNVk4VVJGNndObGFkbUJrTXh2cEIzSGs3LW0zUGpUYWVSTVJEZS1JRUg5bG15M0FzMkpIaUp6Y0RtYnRlMU1GbmotYjI2blNTWi05QnhnVzk2dG5z?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I8</a> <a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I9</a></span></li>
  <li><strong>NCP leadership dispute:</strong> The Nationalist Congress Party faces an internal rift as party members formally challenge the election of Sunetra Pawar as national president.<span class="source-chips"><a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I3</a> <a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I4</a></span></li>
  <li><strong>Legislative progress:</strong> The Lok Sabha has resumed discussions on three bills aimed at implementing reservation for women in the Lower House and State Assemblies.<span class="source-chips"><a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I12</a></span></li>
</ul>

<h2 class="section-title">Policy and Institutions</h2>

<ul class="digest-points">
  <li><strong>Electoral reforms:</strong> Members of the Joint Parliamentary Committee (JPC) are conducting study visits in Lucknow to advance the &#x27;One Nation One Election&#x27; initiative.<span class="source-chips"><a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">W1</a></span></li>
  <li><strong>Judicial and educational oversight:</strong> The CBSE informed the Supreme Court that 47% of its affiliated schools now offer instruction in two or more Indian languages.<span class="source-chips"><a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">W4</a></span></li>
</ul>
